articles.title: Top Signal? Ethereum Foundation Sells $374,000 ETH on Decentralized Exchange
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation, the non-profit organization funding the critical development of Ethereum-related technology, has moved 100 Ether (ETH) tokens other than decentralized exchange CowSwap. The funds were then sold for the DAI stablecoin. According to data from on-chain analysis service Lookonchain, the Ethereum Foundation has sold a total of $12.2 million so far this year […]

articles.title: MicroStrategy (MSTR) Expected To Be Added To Nasdaq 100: Bloomberg
articles.description: The official announcement will likely come this Friday, says Bloomberg.

articles.title: Breaking! Microsoft Rejects Bitcoin: Shareholders Say No to BTC
articles.description: TL;DR Microsoft shareholders rejected a proposal to invest 1% of its funds in Bitcoin, presented by the NCPPR. Michael Saylor, president of MicroStrategy, tried to convince shareholders about the benefits of Bitcoin, but the proposal was rejected. The board argued that Bitcoin’s volatility poses a risk to the company’s financial stability. Microsoft shareholders voted against ... Read more

articles.title: Microsoft Rejects Bitcoin Investment Despite Michael Saylor’s Push
articles.description: Microsoft shareholders have opted to decline a proposal to explore Bitcoin as part of the company’s investment strategy, despite an attempt by MicroStrategy's CEO, Michael Saylor, to advocate for the cryptocurrency. The post Microsoft Rejects Bitcoin Investment Despite Michael Saylor’s Push appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: Microsoft shareholders to vote on Bitcoin investment proposal in an hour, what we should expect?
articles.description: Microsofts shareholder vote on the Bitcoin investment proposal is approaching, but prediction market traders see only a small chance that it will pass.Polymarket bettors predict that Microsoft shareholders will not approve the Bitcoin investment proposal, estimating only a 11% likelihood of a favorable vote. The odds of approval initially peaked at 22% when the poll was launched, but have...

articles.title: Cardano Faces Critical Moment: Can ADA Hold Above $1 and Continue Its Long-Term Growth?
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) finds itself at a critical juncture, trading at $1.01, as it faces the possibility of dropping below the key $1 threshold. The post Cardano Faces Critical Moment: Can ADA Hold Above $1 and Continue Its Long-Term Growth? appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: Bitcoin Critic Peter Schiff Urges US to Sell Seized BTC
articles.description: The proceeds would reduce the budget deficit and "put an end to all the nonsense about creating a harmful 'Strategic' Bitcoin Reserve," he said.

articles.title: “Bitcoin Is The Future Of Money” Says CZ Binance At Bitcoin MENA
articles.description: Changpeng Zhao, the co-founder of Binance, stated “Bitcoin is the future of money” in a two-day conference, Bitcoin MENA at ADNEC in Abu Dhabi. CZ Binance was one of the keynote speakers at the conference. articles.title: Russia Considers Bitcoin Reserve for Stability
articles.description: Russian lawmaker proposes a Bitcoin reserve to enhance financial stability, citing independence from sanctions and inflation risks of traditional currencies.

articles.title: Russian Lawmaker Proposes Bitcoin Reserve to Improve Financial Stability
articles.description: Russian State Duma Deputy Anton Tkachev, a member of the New People party, has suggested creating a strategic Bitcoin reserve to strengthen the country’s financial stability. According to local reports in Moscow, Tkachev has formally submitted this proposal to Finance Minister Anton Siluanov. Russia to Consider Plans for a Bitcoin Reserve? In the proposal, Tkachev highlights the limitations...
